changes: Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-1] test: Verifies admin can see ALL equipment including unassigned equipment across all battalions
Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-2] test: Verifies admin can update equipment fields (quantity, status, description) with edit button access
Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-3] test: Verifies admin must provide battalionId when creating equipment (field is required)
Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-4] test: Verifies admin can create equipment in any battalion (not restricted to own battalion)
Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-5] test: Verifies admin can delete any equipment in the system with delete button access
Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-6] test: Verifies admin can create transfer requests and also approve them (not auto-approved)
Added [ADMIN-EQUIP-7] test: Verifies admin can transfer equipment to any unit or personnel in any battalion
Added [ADMIN-XFER-1] test: Verifies admin can initiate transfer to any battalion with access to all units/personnel
Added [ADMIN-XFER-2] test: Verifies admin can approve incoming transfer requests with accept button enabled
Added [ADMIN-XFER-3] test: Verifies admin can reject incoming transfer requests with reject button enabled
Added [ADMIN-XFER-4] test: Verifies admin transfer requests require approval workflow (not auto-approved)
Added [ADMIN-XFER-5] test: Verifies admin can see transfer history across all battalions
